board_csa_architect.notes: Simple SSE route addition. Tenant-scoped via RLS. No schema impact.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: SSE must respect auth token. Tenant isolation via org_id filter. No PII exposure.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/VRAM impact. Pure backend streaming endpoint.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: SSE reconnect already handled by client. Keep-alive ping aligns with REQ-L3.5-06.
